faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.description: Everything you need to know about our services.

list.question: What AI tools are available on your platform?
list.answer: Our platform offers AI-powered image generation, video generation, image editing, background removal, image enhancement, object removal, image analysis, collage creation, and other creative AI tools.

list.question: Do I need design experience to use the AI tools?
list.answer: No. Our AI tools are designed for everyone. Simply enter a text prompt or upload your media, and the AI will handle the rest.

list.question: Can I generate images from text prompts?
list.answer: Yes. Describe your idea in natural language, and our AI will generate high-quality images based on your prompt.

list.question: Can I create videos using AI?
list.answer: Yes. You can generate videos from text prompts or transform existing images into engaging AI-generated videos.

list.question: Can I edit existing images with AI?
list.answer: Absolutely. Upload an image to remove objects, replace backgrounds, enhance quality, restore old photos, or apply creative edits using AI.

list.question: How does AI image analysis work?
list.answer: Our AI analyzes uploaded images to identify objects, scenes, colors, text, and other visual elements, providing detailed insights automatically.

list.question: Can I remove the background from an image?
list.answer: Yes. Our AI can automatically detect the subject and remove or replace the background with just one click.

list.question: Does the platform support collage creation?
list.answer: Yes. You can combine multiple images into beautiful AI-assisted collages using customizable layouts, spacing, and styling options.

list.question: What image formats are supported?
list.answer: We support popular image formats including JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, and other commonly used file types.

list.question: Can I improve the quality of blurry or low-resolution images?
list.answer: Yes. Our AI enhancement tools can upscale images, reduce noise, sharpen details, and improve overall image quality.

list.question: Is my uploaded content secure and private?
list.answer: Yes. We prioritize user privacy and handle uploaded files securely. Your content is processed safely and according to our privacy policy.

list.question: How long does AI image or video generation take?
list.answer: Most image generation and editing tasks are completed within seconds, while video generation may take a little longer depending on the complexity and duration.

list.question: Can I use the generated images and videos commercially?
list.answer: In most cases, yes. Commercial usage depends on your subscription plan and the applicable licensing terms for generated content.

list.question: Do the AI tools work on mobile devices?
list.answer: Yes. Our platform is fully responsive and works seamlessly on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

list.question: What should I do if I don't get the expected results?
list.answer: Try using a more detailed prompt, upload a higher-quality image, or adjust the editing options. Small changes often produce significantly better AI-generated results.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
items: Account information such as your name, email address, or phone number.
Images, videos, and media files you upload.
Text prompts used for AI generation and editing.
Device information, browser type, IP address, and usage statistics.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Edit, enhance, restore, or transform uploaded media.
Improve our services and AI models.

sections.title: 4. Uploaded Images & Videos
sections.text: Uploaded files are processed only to complete your requested task. Temporary copies may be stored during processing and automatically removed according to our retention policy.

sections.title: 5. Generated Content
sections.text: You retain ownership of content you upload. You are responsible for ensuring you have the necessary rights to use uploaded media and that generated content complies with applicable laws.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
sections.text: Data is retained only as long as necessary to provide services, improve performance, comply with legal obligations, and maintain account functionality.

sections.title: 8. Payment Information
sections.text: Payments are securely processed through our trusted payment partners (such as Razorpay/Stripe). We do not store your debit card, credit card, UPI PIN, CVV, net banking credentials, or other sensitive payment information on our servers.

sections.title: 9. Sharing Information
sections.text: We do not sell your personal information. Information may be shared with trusted cloud, payment, analytics, and AI service providers when required to operate our services.

sections.title: 11. Contact Us
sections.text: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact our support team through the application or website.

sections.title: 1. Eligibility
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years old or have parental consent to use our services.

sections.title: 2. User Account
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining your account credentials and all activities under your account.

sections.title: 3. Services
sections.content: We provide AI image generation, video generation, editing, collage creation, and analysis services.

sections.title: 4. Credits & Subscription
sections.content: Credits are non-transferable, may expire according to your plan, and are deducted when processing begins.

sections.title: 5. Payments
sections.content: Payments are processed through secure payment providers. Applicable taxes including GST may apply.

sections.title: 6. Refund Policy
sections.intro: Digital purchases are generally non-refundable because services are delivered immediately.
sections.eligibleTitle: Refunds may be considered in the following cases:
eligible: Payment deducted but credits not received.
Refund required under applicable Indian law.

sections.title: 7. User Content
sections.content: You retain ownership of uploaded content while granting us permission to process it for providing the requested service.

sections.title: 8. AI Generated Content
sections.content: AI-generated outputs may contain inaccuracies and should be reviewed before professional or commercial use.

sections.title: 9. Prohibited Activities
sections.content: Users must not upload illegal, infringing, malicious, or abusive content.

sections.title: 10. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Our software, branding, and platform remain our intellectual property.

sections.title: 11. Privacy
sections.content: Your use of our platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Our liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by Indian law.

sections.title: 13. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of India.

sections.title: 14. Contact Us
sections.content: For questions regarding these Terms, please contact our support team.
